statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); in_tok=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0'); out_tok=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0'); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); ctx_part=""; [ -n "$used" ] && ctx_part=" | ctx: $(printf '%.0f' "$used")%"; cost=$(awk -v i="$in_tok" -v o="$out_tok" 'BEGIN { c = (i * 3 / 1000000) + (o * 15 / 1000000); printf "%.2f", c }'); cost_part=""; [ "$(awk -v c="$cost" 'BEGIN { print (c > 0) }')" = "1" ] && cost_part=" | ~\$$cost"; dir_part=" | $cwd"; branch_part=""; [ -n "$branch" ] && branch_part=" | $branch"; printf '%s%s%s%s%s' "$model" "$ctx_part" "$cost_part" "$dir_part" "$branch_part"
